full_text:
Ma Qiu 馬秋
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Qiu (馬秋). Son of Ma Chao, handed over to Zhang Lu by Cao Cao and was killed. Ma Qiu was affiliated with Ma Chao, Zhang Lu, and the Wei Kingdom.
